instructions.instruction: Initialize Biome with bunx @biomejs/biome init, then customize biome.json — never commit default config without reviewing formatter width, linter domains, and VCS ignores
instructions.original_snippets: Initialize config if missing: bunx @biomejs/biome init...NEVER skip biome.json customization after init...Define formatter width, linter domains, and VCS ignores explicitly.
instructions.relevant_when: adding Biome to a project for the first time

instructions.instruction: Run bunx @biomejs/biome check . to surface all diagnostics, then bunx @biomejs/biome check . --write to apply safe autofixes
instructions.original_snippets: Run checks and capture results: bunx @biomejs/biome check ....Apply safe autofixes: bunx @biomejs/biome check . --write
instructions.relevant_when: running Biome checks on a repository

instructions.instruction: In CI, use bunx @biomejs/biome check . --error-on-warnings to fail on both errors and warnings
instructions.original_snippets: Verify commands pass in local and CI contexts: bunx @biomejs/biome check . --error-on-warnings...Exit code 0 indicates success.
instructions.relevant_when: adding Biome to a CI pipeline

instructions.instruction: NEVER run Biome and ESLint on the same files — route TS linting and formatting through Biome only
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER run Biome and ESLint on the same files...Route TS linting and formatting through Biome only.
instructions.relevant_when: migrating from ESLint or setting up Biome alongside existing ESLint config

instructions.instruction: NEVER run Prettier and Biome formatter on the same files — keep only biome format . --write for supported files
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER run Prettier and Biome formatter on the same files...Keep only biome format . --write for supported files.
instructions.relevant_when: migrating from Prettier or setting up Biome alongside existing Prettier config

instructions.instruction: NEVER blanket-ignore diagnostics to get green CI — add narrow suppressions with a reason and follow-up ticket
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER blanket-ignore diagnostics to get green CI...Add narrow suppressions with a reason and follow-up ticket.
instructions.relevant_when: silencing Biome warnings or errors in code

instructions.instruction: If biome check fails after migration, isolate conflicting rules by temporarily disabling rule groups in biome.json, then re-enable one group at a time
instructions.original_snippets: Error Recovery: If biome check fails after migration, isolate conflicting rules by temporarily disabling rule groups in biome.json linter section, then re-enable one group at a time to identify the source.
instructions.relevant_when: troubleshooting biome check failures after ESLint/Prettier migration

instructions.instruction: Confirm scope before starting: migration, config, lint, format, or CI — then follow the deterministic workflow step-by-step
instructions.original_snippets: Confirm scope: migration, config, lint, format, or CI.
instructions.relevant_when: any Biome task — establish scope first
